interactions.description: Increased risk of bleeding due to additive anticoagulant effects
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. If necessary, monitor INR closely and adjust warfarin dose

interactions.description: Increased risk of liver damage, especially with chronic alcohol use
interactions.recommendation: Avoid alcohol consumption while taking paracetamol. Limit paracetamol dose to <2g/day in chronic alcohol users

interactions.description: Increased risk of lactic acidosis
interactions.recommendation: Avoid excessive alcohol consumption. Monitor for signs of lactic acidosis

interactions.description: Reduced absorption of ciprofloxacin due to chelation with metal ions
interactions.recommendation: Take ciprofloxacin 2 hours before or 6 hours after antacids

interactions.description: NSAIDs may reduce antihypertensive effect and increase risk of kidney damage
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood pressure and kidney function. Consider alternative pain reliever

interactions.description: Grapefruit inhibits metabolism, increasing statin levels and risk of myopathy
interactions.recommendation: Avoid grapefruit juice. Consider alternative statin if needed

interactions.description: Amiodarone increases digoxin levels, risk of toxicity
interactions.recommendation: Reduce digoxin dose by 50%. Monitor digoxin levels closely

interactions.description: Omeprazole may reduce antiplatelet effect of clopidogrel
interactions.recommendation: Consider alternative PPI like pantoprazole

interactions.description: Calcium reduces absorption of levothyroxine
interactions.recommendation: Take levothyroxine 4 hours before or after calcium supplements

interactions.description: Antacids may reduce absorption of azithromycin
interactions.recommendation: Take azithromycin 1 hour before or 2 hours after antacids

interactions.description: Beta-blockers may mask symptoms of hypoglycemia
interactions.recommendation: Monitor blood glucose closely. Educate patient on hypoglycemia symptoms

interactions.description: Phenytoin reduces folic acid levels; folic acid may reduce phenytoin levels
interactions.recommendation: Monitor phenytoin levels. Supplement folic acid cautiously

interactions.description: Antacids significantly reduce ketoconazole absorption
interactions.recommendation: Take ketoconazole 2 hours before antacids

interactions.description: Antibiotics may reduce effectiveness of oral contraceptives
interactions.recommendation: Use additional contraceptive methods during antibiotic treatment

interactions.description: Increased risk of GI bleeding with combined NSAIDs
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. Use single NSAID at lowest effective dose

interactions.description: Amlodipine increases simvastatin levels, risk of myopathy
interactions.recommendation: Limit simvastatin dose to 20mg/day when used with amlodipine

interactions.description: Increased risk of serotonin syndrome
interactions.recommendation: Monitor for serotonin syndrome symptoms. Consider alternative analgesic

interactions.description: Increased risk of hyperkalemia
interactions.recommendation: Monitor potassium levels closely. Avoid potassium supplements

interactions.description: Clarithromycin increases statin levels, risk of rhabdomyolysis
interactions.recommendation: Temporarily discontinue statin during clarithromycin treatment

interactions.description: Allopurinol inhibits azathioprine metabolism, severe toxicity risk
interactions.recommendation: Reduce azathioprine dose by 75% if combination necessary. Monitor blood counts
